content:
🚀 core | Rust
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide users with a private, secure, and self-hostable home security camera system that prioritizes data privacy through end-to-end encryption and avoids reliance on third-party cloud services.
✨ Key Features: • End-to-end encrypted remote access • 5-minute setup • Open source • Fully reproducible releases • Local AI capabilities (implied by topics)
📖 Summary: Secluso is a privacy-focused, open-source home security camera system for Raspberry Pi. It offers end-to-end encrypted remote access to live video, alerts, and recordings, ensuring footage is not shared with cloud providers. The system emphasizes a quick 5-minute setup and reproducible builds for transparency and trust.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
